contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Autopilot email_poller: preserve UNREAD on non-actionable + dry-run
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/35
  
  Details:
  Fixed autopilot's email polling so it stops silently swallowing operator unread mail.
  
  Root cause: app/email_poller.py was calling users.messages.modify with removeLabelIds:['UNREAD'] OUTSIDE the action gate — every email autopilot fetched got marked read, even ones not classified as actionable and ones autopilot would have handled if not in dry-run.
  
  Fix:
  - Non-actionable message → continue without modifying Gmail state. Operator reads it normally.
  - Actionable + dry_run → log intent, leave UNREAD so operator can verify before flipping live.
  - Actionable + not dry_run → handle, then mark read (the action is captured as PR / log; email no longer needs operator attention).
  
  users.messages.get does not modify read state in Gmail's REST API, so fetching to classify is safe — only the explicit modify call changes labels, and we moved that inside the gate.
  
  Shipped via PR #35, deployed via scripts/deploy.sh to truesight-autopilot EC2 host. Health check post-deploy: dry_run=false, gmail_token_set=true, both uvicorn workers restarted cleanly at 22:15:27 UTC.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
